basics.name: Vikas Pandey, Ph.D.
basics.label: Research Scientist
basics.summary: Research Scientist at Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute and Co-PI in the RPI-IBM Artificial Intelligence Research Collaboration (AIRC). Working at the intersection of biophotonics, computational modeling, time-resolved functional imaging, and machine learning for oncology and infectious disease diagnostics.

work.name: Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute
work.summary: Centre for Modeling, Simulation & Imaging in Medicine (CeMSIM) & Biomedical Engineering
highlights: In vivo non-invasive optical imaging for drug internalization quantification in HER2+ tumor xenografts via Fluorescence Lifetime Imaging (FLI)
Developing deep learning and AI hardware accelerator algorithms for real-time FLI for image-guided surgery
Developing macro- and mesoscopic optical imaging setups including single-pixel and light-sheet based systems
FLI data processing using Deep Learning models and Hierarchical Bayesian inferences
Co-Principal Investigator in the RPI-IBM Artificial Intelligence Research Collaboration (AIRC)
Mentoring 1 PhD student and guiding 2 undergraduate students

work.name: Rensselaer Polytechnic Institute
highlights: In vivo non-invasive optical imaging for drug internalization quantification in HER2+ tumour xenografts via FLI
Machine learning model development to simplify and accelerate analysis of complex inverse problems in FLI

work.name: Valetude Primus Healthcare Pvt. Ltd.
highlights: Strategic financial and operational planning
Scientific expertise in technology and product development

work.name: Valetude Primus Healthcare Pvt. Ltd.
highlights: Led multiple healthcare technology development projects as Principal Investigator; developed prototypes and full products
Conducted multi-centric clinical validations; received CDSCO certification for TB-product from the Drug Controller General of India
Secured patents in US, UK, South Africa, and India for four innovative technologies
Managed stakeholder relationships including investors, manufacturers, customers, regulators, and academics

work.name: Evalueserve Pvt. Ltd.
highlights: Developed statistical models for forecasting and prediction in data science projects
Performed competitive benchmarking and data analysis to inform business strategy

title: Development of an optical module for nano-analysis and rapid diagnosis of infectious diseases

education.studyType: Bachelor and Master of Technology (Dual Degree)
title: Integrated 5-year dual degree program in Biochemical Engineering and Biotechnology

awards.title: Gandhian Young Technology Innovation Award

awards.summary: Conferred by the Honorable President of India for the development of an effective tuberculosis diagnostics method in resource-limited settings. Award amount: 1,500,000 INR.

awards.title: Longitude Prize Discovery Award
awards.summary: For innovation in Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) detection. Amount: 1,150,000 INR.

awards.summary: Lifetime membership in the scientific research honour society.

projects.name: pyFLI — Open-source Fluorescence Lifetime Imaging Library
projects.summary: Authored and published pyfli-lib on PyPI, an open-source Python package for unified, scalable processing and analysis of Fluorescence Lifetime Imaging data.
highlights: Open-source
PyPI package
FLI data processing

projects.name: RPI-IBM AIRC: Neural Network Accelerator for Real-time FLI
projects.summary: Co-PI developing FPGA-accelerated deep learning models for real-time fluorescence lifetime imaging in image-guided surgery.
highlights: FPGA acceleration
Neural network compression
Real-time FLI

projects.name: SeeTB — Portable TB Diagnostic Device
projects.summary: Developed a compact TIRF-based fluorescence device for tuberculosis diagnosis in resource-limited settings. Received CDSCO medical device certification in India.
highlights: CDSCO certified
Resource-limited settings
Field-deployable
